metadata.description: A comprehensive Claude Code plugin marketplace providing specialized skills, agents, and commands for 4 industry domains and 7 developer roles, informed by the Software Engineer by RN competency matrix.

plugins.name: alpha-core
plugins.description: Cross-cutting engineering skills: databases, security, API design, testing patterns, architecture, performance, CI/CD, observability, cloud infrastructure, and code review. Foundation skills used by all roles and domains.

plugins.name: role-frontend
plugins.description: Senior Frontend Developer role plugin. React, Vue, Angular expertise with accessibility, CSS architecture, state management, and frontend performance optimization.

plugins.name: role-backend
plugins.description: Senior Backend Developer role plugin. API implementation, database design, microservices, message queues, caching, authentication, and background job processing.

plugins.name: role-mobile
plugins.description: Senior Mobile Developer role plugin. React Native, Flutter, iOS native (Swift), Android native (Kotlin), mobile performance, security, and offline-first patterns.

plugins.name: role-devops
plugins.description: Senior DevOps Engineer role plugin. Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, incident response, cost optimization, and secrets management.

plugins.name: role-aqa
plugins.description: Senior AQA Engineer role plugin. Test strategy design, E2E testing, API testing, performance testing, security testing, mobile testing, and CI test integration.

plugins.name: role-architect
plugins.description: Senior Architect role plugin. System design, ADR writing, scalability analysis, tech stack advisory, migration planning, cost modeling, threat modeling, and capacity planning.

plugins.name: role-fullstack
plugins.description: Senior Fullstack Engineer role plugin. End-to-end scaffolding, API-frontend integration, auth flows, real-time features, file uploads, search, deployment workflows, and monorepo management.

plugins.name: domain-iot
plugins.description: IoT domain plugin. MQTT patterns, device management, edge computing, IoT security, time-series data handling, protocol advisory, cloud integration, and digital twin architecture.

plugins.name: domain-ecommerce
plugins.description: E-Commerce domain plugin. Payment integration (Stripe, PayPal, Adyen), product catalogs, cart/checkout flows, inventory management, order processing, PCI DSS compliance, and analytics.

plugins.name: domain-fintech
plugins.description: Fintech domain plugin. Financial data modeling, transaction processing, double-entry ledger design, regulatory compliance (SOX, PSD2, KYC/AML), fraud detection, trading systems, and banking APIs.

plugins.name: domain-healthcare
plugins.description: HealthCare domain plugin. HIPAA compliance, HL7 FHIR interoperability, PHI data handling, clinical data modeling, EHR integration, medical device software, telehealth architecture, and healthcare analytics.
